title: Halal Date Crunchy Delight
description: A delicious dessert combining crunchy texture and sweet dates. This halal recipe is perfect for satisfying your sweet tooth.
instructions: Mix together crunchy and softened butter in a bowl.
Add pitted dates to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a preheated dish.
Bake for 15-20 minutes or until golden brown.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Optional: garnish with additional crunchy for texture.
